title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CDAC - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CDAC - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CDAC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About CDAC:
CDAC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC!
